title: aglaia elliptica subsp. elliptica
intro: Aglaia elliptica subsp. elliptica, also known as the Philippine or elliptical aglaia, is a species of plant in the Meliaceae family, native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Aglaia elliptica subsp. elliptica include its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, making it potentially useful in the management of various diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal concoction.
